item.title: Meta-Analysis: Crohn's Disease Exclusion Diet for Induction and Maintenance in Crohn's Disease.
item.description: Alimentary pharmacology & therapeutics - Review - There is a contemporary interest in dietary therapies for the treatment of inflammatory bowel disease. We performed a systematic review and meta-analysis to analyse the clinical effectiveness of th...

item.title: Standard malnutrition screening tools inadequately capture comprehensive nutritional needs in outpatients with inflammatory bowel disease.
item.description: Crohn's & colitis 360 - Malnutrition is common in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) patients and associated with worse outcomes and quality of life. This study aimed to assess the feasibility of referring outpatient IBD pa...
